lunar_new_year.name: Lunar New Year
messages: The city buzzes with Lunar New Year energy!
Red lanterns hang from every streetlamp.
Fireworks echo across the harbor.
Everyone seems more generous today.

special_events.free_meal: A kind stranger buys you dumplings!
special_events.lucky_money: You find a red envelope with $20!
special_events.extra_clients: Word spreads about the 'lucky witch' - more clients!

spring_equinox.name: Spring Equinox
messages: Perfect balance of day and night.
Fresh growth energy fills the air.
Flowers bloom in every window box.

summer_solstice.name: Summer Solstice
messages: The longest day brings endless possibilities.
The sun doesn't set until 9 PM!
Beach readings are especially popular.

autumn_equinox.name: Autumn Equinox
messages: The air turns crisp with autumn magic.
Harvest season brings grateful clients.
Your readings feel especially grounded.

winter_solstice.name: Winter Solstice
messages: The longest night invites deep reflection.
Candles create the perfect reading atmosphere.
Clients seek guidance for the year ahead.

samhain.name: Samhain
messages: The veil between worlds grows thin.
Clients ask about departed loved ones.
Your intuition feels supernaturally sharp.

beltane.name: Beltane
messages: Love is in the air!
Everyone wants relationship readings.
Flower crowns are trending.
